label: bad
draft_body: I noticed Ramp is hiring a number of Growth roles this quarter. Growth is obviously a massive lever for a company at your stage and scale, and the way most finance-adjacent fintechs approach the problem tends to fragment attribution across too many tools. In my experience working with similar companies over the past several years, the single biggest unlock is usually unifying warehouse-native attribution with a proper experimentation velocity framework, and then layering in a lightweight reverse-ETL workflow so your SDR team can act on the signal before it goes stale. I spent the last few months building exactly this kind of stack for a late-stage fintech and we saw our reply rates triple in about six weeks. Would love to show you what we built — we could hop on a call this week, next week, the week after, whenever works. Also open to just sending over a short written teardown if that's easier. Let me know what's best for you and I'll make it happen.
